result.stdout:
Description:
  An F# LSP server implementation

Usage:
  fsautocomplete [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Options:
  -v, --debug, --verbose                                       Enable verbose logging. This is equivalent to --log-level debug.
  --attach-debugger                                            Launch the system debugger and break immediately
  -l, --log-file, --logfile <logfile>                          Send log output to specified file.
  --filter, --log-filter <filter>                              Filter logs by category. The category can be seen in the logs inside []. For example: [Compiler].
  --attachdebugger, --wait-for-debugger                        Stop execution on startup until an external debugger to attach to this process
  --project-graph-enabled                                      Enable MSBuild Graph workspace loading. Should be faster than the default, but is experimental.
  --adaptive-lsp-server-enabled                                Enable LSP Server based on FSharp.Data.Adaptive. Should be more stable, but is experimental.
  --log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Set the log verbosity to a specific level.
  --state-directory <state-directory>                          Set the directory to store the state of the server. This should be a per-workspace location, not a shared-workspace location. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-fsautocomplete-0.83.0-1c050db9e9ba4df884c061070ef0c256]
  --otel-exporter-enabled                                      Enabled OpenTelemetry exporter. See https://opentelemetry.io/docs/reference/specification/protocol/exporter/ for environment variables to configure for the exporter.
  --use-fcs-transparent-compiler                               Use Transparent Compiler in FSharp.Compiler.Services. Should have better performance characteristics, but is experimental. See https://github.com/dotnet/fsharp/pull/15179 for more details.
  -?, -h, --help                                               Show help and usage information
  --version                                                    Show version information

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

Usage:

  --attachdebugger, --wait-for-debugger                        Stop execution on startup until an external debugger to attach to this process

  --adaptive-lsp-server-enabled                                Enable LSP Server based on FSharp.Data.Adaptive. Should be more stable, but is experimental.

  --state-directory <state-directory>                          Set the directory to store the state of the server. This should be a per-workspace location, not a shared-workspace location. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-fsautocomplete-0.83.0-1c050db9e9ba4df884c061070ef0c256]
  --otel-exporter-enabled                                      Enabled OpenTelemetry exporter. See https://opentelemetry.io/docs/reference/specification/protocol/exporter/ for environment variables to configure for the exporter.
  --use-fcs-transparent-compiler                               Use Transparent Compiler in FSharp.Compiler.Services. Should have better performance characteristics, but is experimental. See https://github.com/dotnet/fsharp/pull/15179 for more details.
